item.creategeoresonance.seismic_hammer.t: A handheld seismic striker that consumes _pressure_ to detect underground _caves_, _water_, and _lava_.
Use Shift+Right-click to place. Then you can charge it using _rotation_, similar to backtank. Also can pull air from a worn _Backtank_.
When pressure is low, scans are _weaker_: depth is reduced and echo identity becomes ambiguous. Striking _dirt_, _sand_, or _gravel_ dampens scan depth.
